psake Task (simple).description: A minimal psake task with an inline action block.

psake Task (full).description: A psake task with Depends and Description parameters.

psake Task (no action).description: A psake task that only declares dependencies (no action block).

psake Properties.description: A psake Properties block for declaring shared build variables.

psake Include.description: Include another PowerShell script into the build.

psake Framework.description: Set the .NET framework version used for MSBuild.

psake FormatTaskName.description: Customize how task names are displayed when the build runs.

psake TaskSetup.description: A block that runs before each task.

psake TaskTearDown.description: A block that runs after each task.

body: ${0:# Runs once before the first task}
psake BuildSetup.description: A block that runs once before the first task in the build.

body: ${0:# Runs once after all tasks complete (or on failure)}
psake BuildTearDown.description: A block that runs once after all tasks complete, or when the build fails.

psake FormatTaskName (string).description: Set a format string for task name display. {0} is replaced with the task name.

psake Task (precondition).description: A psake task that only runs when a precondition is met.

psake Task (postcondition).description: A psake task with a postcondition that validates the task produced expected output.

psake Exec.description: Run an external command and fail the build if it returns a non-zero exit code.

psake Exec (with retries).description: Run an external command with automatic retry on failure.

psake Assert.description: Assert a condition is true, failing the build with a message if it is not.
